notes.en: Adds update checking, appearance theme selection, a redesigned Todo execution view, capture reliability fixes, and macOS capture support fixes.
notes.zh-CN: 新增更新检测、外观主题选择，优化 Todo 执行视图，并修复抓取稳定性和 macOS 抓取支持。

en: Added built-in update checking from the public release metadata.
Added System, Light, and Dark appearance modes.
Redesigned the Todo detail view around execution, editing, next steps, and completion criteria.
Refined capture notifications and item actions.
Added a Windows clipboard fallback for more reliable global capture.
Fixed macOS capture support and AI-generated tag language handling.
Improved onboarding/home wording, starter data localization, and branding copy.
zh-CN: 新增基于公开发布元数据的内置更新检测。
增加跟随系统、浅色模式和深色模式。
围绕执行、编辑、下一步和完成标准优化 Todo 详情视图。
优化抓取通知和条目操作。
增加 Windows 剪贴板兜底，提高全局抓取稳定性。
修复 macOS 抓取支持和 AI 生成标签的语言归属。
优化首页引导词、初始数据本地化和品牌文案。
